summary: Completed backend + preview UI regression for sync-status additions. All requested sync flows pass (dashboard, variant detail snapshot, app-meta mode pages), login/logout works, and full pytest suite passes.

ui_bugs.issue: Password input and Authenticate button still lack data-testid attributes, reducing selector stability for automation.
Primary form inputs and submit button do not expose data-testid attributes, limiting maintainable e2e coverage.

issues: Footer helper text remains low-contrast on dark background.

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to login controls and variant form controls for robust automated regression testing.
Optional: improve login footer text contrast for accessibility.
critical_code_review_comments: Sync-status wiring is consistent: base panel API, dashboard snapshot polling, variant snapshot polling, and app-meta polling all map to expected pages/modes.
No backend regression observed from sync-status additions; unauthorized API responses remain JSON 401 as expected for /api routes.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_SYNC_VARIANT via preview UI to validate variant-detail snapshot sync flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview regression executed against https://33b5141b-c4f0-4d63-b740-5a43a3fe6f13.preview.emergentagent.com. Verified sync panel on dashboard/new/edit/detail pages, dashboard transitions to Synced after polling, variant snapshot endpoint returns payload/version, and logout returns to login.
rca of the issue: No blocking issue reproduced. Remaining findings are testability/accessibility quality gaps (missing data-testid on some key controls, low-contrast helper text).
